title: SUCCESS: Three high-ROI fixes: (1) DEFAULT_GITHUB_PLAN_PRICES hardcod
content: What worked: Three high-ROI fixes: (1) DEFAULT_GITHUB_PLAN_PRICES hardcoded in billing.js so revenue tracking never depends on env vars, (2) landing page CTAs now route through /checkout/pro for attribution capture, (3) client-side telemetry script added for CTA click and page view tracking with UTM passthrough
